message:
fix(channel/broadcast): move receiver_count increment inside lock to prevent subscribe race

Moves the receiver_count.fetch_add(1, Relaxed) call from before the lock
acquisition to inside the locked section where total_sent is read. The
previous ordering allowed a TOCTOU window where a concurrent send() could
observe the incremented receiver count but the new receiver had not yet
captured total_sent, meaning it could miss a message that was sent after
the count was bumped but before the lock was acquired. By performing the
atomic increment while the inner lock is held, the receiver's subscription
point is now consistent with the count visible to senders.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
